adversarialCases.scenario: A broad .gitignore pattern can hide tracked first-party source from CodeGraph scanning.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The repo-vs-index parity check reports zero missing files after the narrow unignore fix.

adversarialCases.scenario: Local CodeGraph SQLite state must not be committed while fixing indexing.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: .codegraph remains ignored/local-only and no DB artifact is tracked.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Make CodeGraph indexing clean for the full supported source surface of /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt-brain.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Future AI maintenance can use CodeGraph with no supported tracked source files missing, no index errors, queryable vertexai provider files, queryable core debt-brain symbols, and local-only database state.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The broad vertexai ignore rule was narrowed, CodeGraph now indexes 1,248 supported files with zero missing/extra/error rows, real symbol queries pass, and durable repo changes were committed and pushed.
